name: Innocent Lies
original_name: บ่วงวิมาลา
overview: Amid a bitter divorce over the luxurious Twilight Resort, Gun’s wife recruits Wimala to steal evidence that could cost her the case. Convinced by claims of abuse and desperate for money to treat her mother, Wimala agrees—unaware she is being drawn into a dangerous web of deception and betrayal.

trailers.title: บ่วงวิมาลา [Official Trailer]
